privileged_info_summary: The task involves publishing a document in Nuxeo Platform using the Publish feature to create a proxy. The source document 'Annual Report 2023' is located at path /default-domain/workspaces/Projects/Annual-Report-2023 and must be published to the target section at /default-domain/sections/Public-Reports. The document title is 'Annual Report 2023'. The verification checks for: document presence in section (35 points), correct title containing 'Annual Report 2023' (25 points), proxy status indicating a proper Publish action (15 points), original document remaining in workspace (15 points), and state change confirmation (10 points). Data is synthetic (generated ACME Corporation annual report PDF created with ReportLab) but stored as real PDF files.
